title: Haddock Chowder Italian Style
description: A creamy and flavorful Italian-inspired chowder made with Canadian haddock, potatoes, and Italian seasonings.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add the celery, onion, and garlic; sauté until the vegetables are softened.
Add the haddock; cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the white wine (if using); cook until the liquid is almost completely reduced.
Add the chicken broth; bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the potatoes; cook until they are tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree some or all of the chowder to your desired consistency.
Stir in the heavy cream; heat the chowder over low heat until warmed through.
Season the chowder with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chowder hot, garnished with chopped parsley or chives (if desired).
